'''rahojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khapol|khapol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khapol|khapol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rahojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhejeth|ræhejeth]] || [[word:ræhejej|ræhejej]] || [[word:ræhejesh|ræhejesh]] || [[word:ræheje|ræheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahohojoth|rahohojoth]] || [[word:rahohojoj|rahohojoj]] || [[word:rahohojosh|rahohojosh]] || [[word:rahohojo|rahohojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahojoth|rahojoth]] || [[word:rahojoj|rahojoj]] || [[word:rahojosh|rahojosh]] || [[word:rahojo|rahojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahofjoth|rahofjoth]] || [[word:rahofjoj|rahofjoj]] || [[word:rahofjosh|rahofjosh]] || [[word:rahofjof|rahofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahojotho|rahojotho]] || [[word:rahojojo|rahojojo]] || [[word:rahojosho|rahojosho]] || [[word:rahojoko|rahojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahojoth|rahojoth]] || [[word:rahojoj|rahojoj]] || [[word:rahojosh|rahojosh]] || [[word:rahojo|rahojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahojothol|rahojothol]] || [[word:rahojojol|rahojojol]] || [[word:rahojoshol|rahojoshol]] || [[word:rahojokol|rahojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahojothotho|rahojothotho]] || [[word:rahojojojo|rahojojojo]] || [[word:rahojoshosho|rahojoshosho]] || [[word:rahojoko|rahojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahojothon|rahojothon]] || [[word:rahojojon|rahojojon]] || [[word:rahojoshon|rahojoshon]] || [[word:rahojokon|rahojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahojothoro|rahojothoro]] || [[word:rahojojoro|rahojojoro]] || [[word:rahojoshoro|rahojoshoro]] || [[word:rahojokoro|rahojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
